title: Lightiodendron guianense
taxonomy: Lightiodendron guianense is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Lightiodendron and is native to the Guiana Shield in South America. This plant is a type of evergreen tree and its classification places it within the clade of flowering plants. The classification also assigns it to the subclass Rosidae and the order Malpighiales. Further classification places it in the family Calophyllaceae and the order Malpighiales.
